# Digital Library Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
Static website digital library that:
- Displays ebooks organized by author/writer
- Integrates with Google Drive for book storage
- Provides book reading and download functionality
- Built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- Hosted on GitHub Pages

## Project Stack
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- **Database**: Google Drive (via API)
- **Hosting**: GitHub Pages
- **IDE**: VS Code

## Development Guidelines
- Keep the project lightweight and static (no backend required)
- Use vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks unless needed)
- Ensure responsive design for all devices
- Implement proper error handling for Google Drive API
- Test locally in live server before deploying

## Project Structure
```
digital-library/
├── index.html
├── css/
│   ├── style.css
│   └── responsive.css
├── js/
│   ├── main.js
│   ├── google-drive-api.js
│   └── utils.js
├── assets/
│   └── images/
├── config.json
└── README.md
```
